claims.source_quote: Economic Cooperation Organization (ECO) was established in 1985 by Iran, Turkey and Pakistan.
claims.claim: The Economic Cooperation Organization was established in 1985 by Iran, Turkey and Pakistan, later expanding in 1992 to include seven additional members.
claims.indicator_or_subject: Economic Cooperation Organization membership and history

claims.source_quote: Pakistan hosted 13[th] ECO Summit on 1st March 2017 in Islamabad.
claims.claim: Pakistan hosted the 13th ECO Summit on 1 March 2017 in Islamabad, and Pakistan's Prime Minister assumed the ECO chairmanship until the next summit.

claims.source_quote: Theme of the Summit was “Connectivity for Regional Prosperity”
claims.claim: The summit theme, Connectivity for Regional Prosperity, aligned with the Government of Pakistan's priorities of improving internal and external connectivity.

claims.source_quote: ECO region represents 16 percent of world’s population but share in global trade is only 2 percent.
claims.claim: The ECO region accounted for 16 percent of the world's population but only 2 percent of global trade, indicating a gap between population scale and trade share.
claims.indicator_or_subject: ECO region population and global trade share
claims.constraint_or_risk: Low share in global trade relative to population

claims.source_quote: Stressed development of ECO connectivity in transport, energy, trade and economics
claims.claim: Pakistan's Prime Minister stressed development of ECO connectivity in transport, energy, trade and economics, linking it with the government's policy of a peaceful neighborhood.

claims.source_quote: Peaceful settlement of longstanding disputes, like Jammu and Kashmir
claims.claim: The Prime Minister stated that peaceful settlement of longstanding disputes, including Jammu and Kashmir, and alleviating Kashmiri suffering would help advance regional stability and development goals.
claims.indicator_or_subject: Peaceful settlement of disputes and regional stability
claims.constraint_or_risk: Longstanding disputes, including Jammu and Kashmir
claims.cause: Peaceful settlement of longstanding disputes and alleviating the sufferings of the Kashmiri people
claims.effect: Advancing the goals of stability and development of the entire region

claims.subsection: Council of Ministers & Senior Officials Meetings
claims.source_quote: The Council reviewed progress made since its last meeting.
claims.claim: The ECO Council of Ministers reviewed progress since its previous meeting, discussed ECO developments since inception, and considered reforms needed to keep pace with evolving regional cooperation requirements.

claims.subsection: Council of Ministers & Senior Officials Meetings
claims.source_quote: finalized Islamabad Declaration and adopted the ECO Vision 2025 along with its implementation framework.
claims.claim: The ECO Council of Ministers finalized the Islamabad Declaration and adopted ECO Vision 2025 with its implementation framework.

claims.subsection: Council of Ministers & Senior Officials Meetings
claims.source_quote: renewed their commitment to promote regional economic integration among the ECO Member States
claims.claim: Participants in the Council of Ministers Meeting renewed their commitment to promote regional economic integration among ECO member states and support the organization's aims and objectives.
claims.effect: Realization of the Organization's aims and objectives

claims.subsection: Council of Ministers & Senior Officials Meetings
claims.source_quote: decided on ways and means to augment cooperation in the areas of connectivity, trade, energy, tourism
claims.claim: The Summit, Council of Ministers Meeting, and Senior Officials Meeting decided to enhance cooperation across connectivity, trade, energy, tourism, investment, industry, economic growth, productivity, social welfare, environment, education, science, culture, and people-to-people contacts.
claims.actor: ECO Summit, Council of Ministers Meeting and Senior Officials Meeting
claims.effect: Augmented cooperation across listed priority areas

claims.source_quote: It set the target to double the trade between ECO Member countries within the next 2-3 years.
claims.claim: The Islamabad Declaration set a target to double trade between ECO member countries within the next two to three years.
claims.effect: Doubling trade between ECO member countries within two to three years

comparison.baseline: current trade between ECO member countries

claims.source_quote: acknowledged and welcomed, China Pakistan Economic Corridor (CPEC) as a far-reaching initiative
claims.claim: The Islamabad Declaration welcomed CPEC as a far-reaching initiative expected to catalyze development across the region and augment existing and planned transit and energy corridors in the ECO region.
claims.effect: Catalyst for development of the entire region and augmentation of transit and energy corridors

claims.source_quote: underscored the three core principles of ECO Vision 2025 of sustainability, integration and conducive environment
claims.claim: The Islamabad Declaration emphasized the ECO Vision 2025 principles of sustainability, integration, and a conducive environment, and called for stronger cooperation in trade, transport, connectivity, energy, tourism, productivity, social welfare, and environment.
claims.indicator_or_subject: ECO Vision 2025 principles and cooperation areas
claims.effect: Augmented cooperation in priority areas identified in Vision 2025

claims.source_quote: reiterated political will and strong commitment for realizing the aims and objectives
claims.claim: The Islamabad Declaration reiterated political will and commitment to ECO's aims of economic development, common prosperity, regional integration, peace, and stability.

claims.source_quote: recalled commitment to the purposes and principles of the UN Charter
claims.claim: The Islamabad Declaration recalled commitment to UN Charter principles, including political independence, sovereignty, territorial integrity, friendly relations among nations, and peaceful dispute settlement.

claims.source_quote: connectivity as a dynamic concept that encompasses multiple dimensions including cyber, energy, rail, road, and ports and shipping.
claims.claim: The Declaration treated connectivity as a multidimensional concept covering cyber, energy, rail, road, ports, and shipping links.

claims.source_quote: encouraged further development of educational and scientific linkages, and cultural and people to people contacts.
claims.claim: The Declaration encouraged further development of educational and scientific linkages as well as cultural and people-to-people contacts.
claims.indicator_or_subject: Education, science, culture, and people-to-people linkages

claims.source_quote: steady and flexible approach to regional connectivity and integration
claims.claim: The Declaration supported a steady and flexible approach to regional connectivity and integration so member states could participate gradually according to their preparedness.
claims.constraint_or_risk: Different levels of member state preparedness
claims.cause: Steady and flexible approach to regional connectivity and integration
claims.effect: Member states can contribute to, be part of, and benefit from connectivity and integration programs gradually and progressively

claims.source_quote: reiterated commitment to promote Intra-ECO trade as an instrument of enhanced economic cooperation
claims.claim: The Declaration reiterated commitment to promote intra-ECO trade as a tool for enhanced economic cooperation and regional revitalization.
claims.effect: Enhanced economic cooperation and revitalization in the region

claims.source_quote: promotion of conditions for sustainable development through mobilization of economic and social potential
claims.claim: The Declaration stated that achieving sustainable development goals in the ECO region requires stronger cooperation and collaboration, especially through enhanced trade and connectivity among member states.
claims.indicator_or_subject: Sustainable development through trade and connectivity
claims.cause: Enhanced trade and connectivity among the Member States
claims.effect: Strengthened cooperation and collaboration to support sustainable development and historical and cultural ties

claims.source_quote: moderation as an approach to counter all forms of extremism and promote dialog
claims.claim: The Declaration recognized moderation as a means to counter extremism, promote dialogue and social harmony, and contribute to sustainable and inclusive development, equitable growth, stability, and prosperity.
claims.cause: Moderation as an approach to counter extremism and promote dialog, mutual respect, understanding and social harmony
claims.effect: Achievement of sustainable and inclusive development, equitable growth, stability and prosperity

claims.source_quote: acknowledged the importance of Afghanistan for ECO Region and reiterated  continued support
claims.claim: The Declaration acknowledged Afghanistan's importance for the ECO region and reiterated support for reconstruction, sustainable development, peace, and security in Afghanistan.
claims.indicator_or_subject: Afghanistan reconstruction, development, peace and security
claims.effect: Support to national, regional and global efforts for reconstruction, sustainable development, peace and security in Afghanistan

claims.source_quote: welcomed the recently adopted United Nations General Assembly Resolution on proclaiming International Decade for Action “Water for Sustainable Development” (2018-2028).
claims.claim: The Declaration welcomed the UN General Assembly resolution proclaiming the International Decade for Action, Water for Sustainable Development, for 2018-2028.
claims.policy_or_programme: International Decade for Action Water for Sustainable Development (2018-2028)
policy_or_programmes: International Decade for Action Water for Sustainable Development (2018-2028)

claims.source_quote: Member States as well as ECO Secretariat, ECO Specialized Agencies and Regional Institutions will take necessary steps
claims.claim: The Declaration welcomed ECO Vision 2025 and resolved that member states, the ECO Secretariat, specialized agencies, and regional institutions would take necessary steps for timely and effective implementation.
claims.effect: Timely and effective implementation of ECO Vision 2025

claims.source_quote: allowed identifying new areas of cooperation while cementing the progress on matters currently under process.
claims.claim: The Summit gave ECO members an opportunity to reaffirm collective commitment to regional progress and prosperity, identify new cooperation areas, and consolidate ongoing work.
claims.cause: Summit deliberations and decisions on cooperation areas
claims.effect: Reaffirmed collective commitment, identification of new areas of cooperation, and cementing progress on ongoing matters
